message:
test(channel): add deadlock test module

Register a new deadlock_test submodule under src/channel/ gated behind
#[cfg(test)]. The test file itself (deadlock_test.rs) is already present
in the channel directory; this change wires it into the module tree so
cargo test discovers and runs its tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
